zh.lifeSummary: 當John Squire於大約1480年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾貝恩維其可時，他的父親Richard Edward Squire23歲，母親Elizabeth Catharine Sayle21歲。他和Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1572年1月27日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾波丁頓享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Squire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name, occupational name, or a nickname from Middle English squyer, squer, skier, sker, northern Middle English swire (Old French escuyer, escuier) ‘shield bearer, esquire, personal attendant to a knight; landowner below the rank of knight; young man of gentle birth; household attendant, retainer, page, messenger’. Many early bearers of this name were of modest means and cannot have been members of the gentry; in such cases the name may have been used hyperbolically for a low-ranking servant or as a nickname. By the 17th century, the term denoted any member of the landed gentry, but this is unlikely to have influenced the development of the surname.

variants.name: Swire
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Squire  , from a northern form of the word.

variants.name: Quire
meanings: Scottish or Irish: shortened form of   McQuire   (see   McGuire  ).

variants.name: Squires
meanings: English: variant of Squire , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Scuderi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmelo, Salvatore, Angelo, Carlo, Gaetano, Vito, Antonio, Dante, Mario, Rocco, Rosario, Antonino, Biaggio, Eduardo, Ermelinda, Margarita.

Italian (Sicily): status name equivalent to Squire , from scudiero, scutiero, dialect scuteri ‘shieldbearer’ (from medieval Latin scutarius, an agent derivative of scutum ‘shield’). In Byzantium, the Greek word skoutarios denoted a member of the imperial guard.

variants.name: Square
meanings: English (Devon) and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Squire  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Squire was born about 1480, in Benwick, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Edward Squire, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Catharine Sayle, was 21. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon. He died on 27 January 1572, in Podington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93, and was buried in Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Squire est né environ 1480, à Benwick, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Edward Squire, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Catharine Sayle, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1572, à Podington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Squire um 1480 in Benwick, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Edward Squire 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Catharine Sayle 21. Er hatte mit Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. it.lifeSummary: Quando John Squire è nato il circa 1480 nel Benwick, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Edward Squire, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Catharine Sayle, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon. Morì il 27 gennaio 1572, nel Podington, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Squireが約1480年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアベンウィックで生まれた時，父Richard Edward Squireは23歳，母Elizabeth Catharine Sayleは21歳であった。彼はLady Marguerite Capet de Bourbonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1572年1月27日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアポディントンで93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンランベスサイント マリー チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Barton St David, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드
ko.Saint Mary Churchyard, Doddington, Fenla: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 세인트 메리 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: John Squire(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 벤윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Edward Squire(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Catharine Sayle(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 1월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 포딩턴에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 세인트 메리 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Squire nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Benwick, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Edward Squire, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Catharine Sayle, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1572, em Podington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary Churchyard, Doddington, Fenla: сеинт мэри чурчярд, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Squire родился около 1480 г. в местности бенвикк, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Edward Squire было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Catharine Sayle, 21. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon. Он умер 27 января 1572 г. в местности подингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт мэри чурчярд, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Squire nació aproximadamente 1480, en Benwick, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Edward Squire, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Catharine Sayle, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon. Murió el 27 de enero de 1572, en Podington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
